description: Default overview dashboard with key metrics and trends

widgets.title: Total Sales
widgets.sqlQuery: SELECT SUM(sales) AS total_sales FROM retail_db.sales

widgets.title: Revenue Trend
widgets.sqlQuery: SELECT year_id, SUM(sales) AS total_sales FROM retail_db.sales GROUP BY year_id ORDER BY year_id

widgets.title: Sales by Category
widgets.sqlQuery: SELECT category, SUM(sales) AS total_sales FROM retail_db.sales GROUP BY category ORDER BY total_sales DESC LIMIT 10

widgets.title: Top Products
widgets.sqlQuery: SELECT product_name, sales, quantity FROM retail_db.sales ORDER BY sales DESC LIMIT 20
